meta.title: Army Basic Training Week One
meta.description:
The first week, referred to as Zero Week, begins with the trainees meeting the drill sergeants (DS), who will be responsible for their training throughout Basic Combat Training (BCT). Upon arrival at the company area, trainees are divided into platoons and subjected to exercises and drills such as the bag drill or shakedown.

Joining the military? Get Sandboxx to stay connected with friends and family before you ship for training. Download Sandboxx https://link.sandboxx.us/30B5QN2G96
